name: Lemons Stuffed with Sardines
recipeIngredient: 1 Tin Sardines, oil and meat reserved
1 thin Strip of Green Pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off the lemons and scoop out the pulp well. Ensure the lemons stand upright on a plate by cutting off the bottom if necessary.
2. In a saucepan, combine butter and sardine oil. Cook with onion and green pepper until cooled slightly.
3. Add chopped celery, mayonnaise, diced sardines, and chopped hard-boiled egg to the saucepan. Mix well.
4. Stuff the prepared lemons with the mixture, ensuring each is filled evenly.
5. Place a small amount of mayonnaise on top of each lemon to complete the shape.
6. Sprinkle a sprig of parsley on top of each lemon.
7. Chill the stuffed lemons before serving with Melba toast.
Serves 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
